name: moboard
description: Moboard is a cross-device voice dictation keyboard that lets you type on your computer using your mobile phone's voice recognition.

scripts.test: node --check main.js && node --check server.js && node --check scripts/afterSign.js && node --check scripts/build-mobile-pages.js && node --check public/js/desktop.js && node --check public/js/mobile.js
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build:mobile-pages && wrangler pages deploy dist-pages --project-name=moboard

author: Moboard

extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Moboard uses System Events to paste dictated text into the active app.
